creator: shell@shellhung.org
text:
Due to lacking Asia's CPAN and GNU MASTER_SITES
in bsd.sites.mk, more mirror sites maybe needed.

Fix: 

For CPAN :
  http://cpan.shellhung.org/modules/by-module/%SUBDIR%/

For GNU :
  ftp://ftp.shellhung.org/pub/gnu/%SUBDIR%/

My site target to serve visitors who come from
China and HongKong, also, my CPAN mirror site
was marked as "good status mirror site" by CPAN.

ps. Sorry, I don't know am I right to requesting
this changes though the send-pr, please forgive
me if I really did wrong.

thanks
